'''jodhabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:saberlike|saberlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saberlike|saberlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jodhabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodhabithi|jodhabithi]] || [[word:jodhabiji|jodhabiji]] || [[word:jodhabishi|jodhabishi]] || [[word:jodhabiki|jodhabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodhabuthuthu|jodhabuthuthu]] || [[word:jodhabujuju|jodhabujuju]] || [[word:jodhabushushu|jodhabushushu]] || [[word:jodhabukuku|jodhabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodhabuthu|jodhabuthu]] || [[word:jodhabuju|jodhabuju]] || [[word:jodhabushu|jodhabushu]] || [[word:jodhabuku|jodhabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodhabufthuf|jodhabufthuf]] || [[word:jodhabufjuf|jodhabufjuf]] || [[word:jodhabufshuf|jodhabufshuf]] || [[word:jodhabufkuf|jodhabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodhabethe|jodhabethe]] || [[word:jodhabeje|jodhabeje]] || [[word:jodhabeshe|jodhabeshe]] || [[word:jodhabeke|jodhabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodhabothotho|jodhabothotho]] || [[word:jodhabojojo|jodhabojojo]] || [[word:jodhaboshosho|jodhaboshosho]] || [[word:jodhabokoko|jodhabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodhabotho|jodhabotho]] || [[word:jodhabojo|jodhabojo]] || [[word:jodhabosho|jodhabosho]] || [[word:jodhaboko|jodhaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodhabofthof|jodhabofthof]] || [[word:jodhabofjof|jodhabofjof]] || [[word:jodhabofshof|jodhabofshof]] || [[word:jodhabofkof|jodhabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodhabïfthïf|jodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfjïf|jodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfshïf|jodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfkïf|jodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodhabïfthïfthïf|jodhabïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfjïfjïf|jodhabïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfshïfshïf|jodhabïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfkïfkïf|jodhabïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodhabïfthïf|jodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfjïf|jodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfshïf|jodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfkïf|jodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodhabïfthïf|jodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfjïf|jodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfshïf|jodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:jodhabïfkïf|jodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodhabæthæ|jodhabæthæ]] || [[word:jodhabæjæ|jodhabæjæ]] || [[word:jodhabæshæ|jodhabæshæ]] || [[word:jodhabækæ|jodhabækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodhabathatha|jodhabathatha]] || [[word:jodhabajaja|jodhabajaja]] || [[word:jodhabashasha|jodhabashasha]] || [[word:jodhabakaka|jodhabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodhabatha|jodhabatha]] || [[word:jodhabaja|jodhabaja]] || [[word:jodhabasha|jodhabasha]] || [[word:jodhabaka|jodhabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodhabafthaf|jodhabafthaf]] || [[word:jodhabafjaf|jodhabafjaf]] || [[word:jodhabafshaf|jodhabafshaf]] || [[word:jodhabafkaf|jodhabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jodhabasha|jodhabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodhabshësha|jodhabshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodhabrosha|jodhabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodhabmusha|jodhabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodhabyasha|jodhabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodhabnkshësha|gojodhabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodhabnkrosha|gojodhabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodhabnkmusha|gojodhabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodhabnkyasha|gojodhabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jodhadhabasha|jodhadhabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodhadhabshësha|jodhadhabshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodhadhabrosha|jodhadhabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodhadhabmusha|jodhadhabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodhadhabyasha|jodhadhabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodhadhabnkshësha|gojodhadhabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodhadhabnkrosha|gojodhadhabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodhadhabnkmusha|gojodhadhabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodhadhabnkyasha|gojodhadhabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jedhæbasha|jedhæbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jedhæbshësha|jedhæbshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jedhæbrosha|jedhæbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jedhæbmusha|jedhæbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jedhæbyasha|jedhæbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojedhæbnkshësha|gojedhæbnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojedhæbnkrosha|gojedhæbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojedhæbnkmusha|gojedhæbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojedhæbnkyasha|gojedhæbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jodhfabasha|jodhfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodhfabshësha|jodhfabshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodhfabrosha|jodhfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodhfabmusha|jodhfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodhfabyasha|jodhfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodhfabnkshësha|gojodhfabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodhfabnkrosha|gojodhfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodhfabnkmusha|gojodhfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodhfabnkyasha|gojodhfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
